analysis.primary_subject: A completed outdoor pergola structure with thatched roofing, decorative lighting, and potted plants

craftsmanship_quality.precision: High - The structure appears well-aligned with clean cuts and precise joinery
craftsmanship_quality.surface_quality: High - Smooth surfaces on the wooden components and neatly arranged thatch
craftsmanship_quality.attention_to_detail: High - Intricate design elements such as the decorative lighting and plant integration

portfolio_presentation.accompanying_text: This rustic outdoor pergola showcases a blend of traditional and functional design elements. The structure features a thatched roof, decorative lighting, and integrated potted plants, creating a cozy and inviting outdoor space.
